calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katherine Fowler for Adele Zachrisson.

Ms. Fowler stated that she filed a declaration on Friday regarding the allegations made with respect to Ms. Zachrisson's Children and the Husband's health. The Court noted that if it terminates the Trust, all funds go to the Petitioner. Ms. Fowler stated that if the Decedent truly wanted to secure funds for his Sons, he would have established a Marital Trust, spoke of a tax liability on the Sons if they do not get a step up from the Mother, and stated that she is not sure what was in the Trust in 1993. Ms. Fowler also stated that $600,000.00 is a fraction of the Estate, that the Sons have consented and that the Church (contingent Beneficiary) has also consented. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account and for Order Terminating Bypass Trust is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
